# Anastasia Novelly Moylan

> Lead Experience Designer specializing in end-to-end journey design and systems for enterprise AI, B2B SaaS, and finance products.

Anastasia designs end-to-end journeys and systems people can trust: mapping every role, handoff, and state before a screen gets built, and staying involved from strategy through implementation and QA. 10+ years across enterprise B2B software, telecommunications, aviation, home security, and finance.

## Case Studies

- [Designing a Governed AI Workspace for Enterprise Finance](https://anastasiamoylan.github.io/work/governed-ai-finance-workspace): Defined a product model separating experimentation from production for AI-assisted finance analysis, made AI activity inspectable at every step, and gave finance leaders the evidence they needed to trust and approve AI-assisted work. Lead UX / Product Designer, Amdocs Studios, 2025–2026. Completed.
- [Reducing Churn With a Connected Customer Journey Platform](https://anastasiamoylan.github.io/work/connected-customer-journey): Designed an end-to-end mitigation flow turning predictive churn scores into reviewed, edited, and launched customer actions, with human review and monitoring built in. Senior UX Designer, confidential telecommunications company. Completed April 2025.
- [Replacing Manual Billing-Package Assembly With an Auditable Workflow](https://anastasiamoylan.github.io/work/auditable-billing-workflow): Replaced a fragmented, ownerless billing process with an auditable workflow, a shared status model, and a phased automation roadmap. Design Lead and UX / Product Strategy Lead, confidential telecommunications client engagement. Completed.
- [Making Enterprise AI Answers Verifiable Across Complex Documents](https://anastasiamoylan.github.io/work/enterprise-document-knowledge): Built a multi-phase AI document workspace with sourced chat, inline citations, and side-by-side comparison so generated answers stayed verifiable back to their source. UX and Product Strategy Lead. Completed.

## About

- [About](https://anastasiamoylan.github.io/about): 10+ years across B2B SaaS, telecommunications, aviation, and finance. Currently Lead Experience Designer at Amdocs Studios (formerly Stellar Elements); previously American Airlines and Brinks Home Security.
- [Design Philosophy](https://anastasiamoylan.github.io/philosophy): Seven principles — design flows not screens, design through implementation, design holistically not in isolation, make AI uncertainty visible and consequential actions reversible, critique in service of the decision not the deliverable, coach judgment not just output, and improve continuously from evidence.
- [Resume](https://anastasiamoylan.github.io/resume): Full work history, skills, and education.

## Contact

- [Contact](https://anastasiamoylan.github.io/contact): Open to senior product design roles. Email anastasianmoylan.design@gmail.com or connect on LinkedIn (linkedin.com/in/anastasia-novelly-moylan-76a70052).
